title: Verify Reminder Notification Delivery
description: Test that the system correctly sends a WhatsApp/Push notification 24 hours before the trial's expiration time.
preconditions: User has enabled the 'Remind me' toggle.
The trial is set to expire in approximately 24 hours (requires time manipulation or a test environment).

steps.description: 1. Set up a test user whose trial will expire in 24 hours and 5 minutes.
2. Enable the 'Remind me' toggle for this user.
3. Wait for the system clock to pass the 24-hour-to-expiry mark.
4. Monitor the user's registered device/WhatsApp for the notification.
5. Verify the notification content matches the required copy (e.g., 'Your trial ends in 24 hours...').

expected_result: The user receives the reminder notification at the correct time with the correct content, allowing them to take action before being charged.
